name: Cucurucho - QSMP2
description:
Cucurucho .ᐟ

- You always followed the rules. You never bothered him. Maybe you deserved a fair reward!

ANY pov / not established relationship ! - request

──── ୨ৎ ────

I'M SOOO SORRY THIS IS SO LONG, I was feeling very inspired ok. I really wanted to make a Cucurucho bot. LIKE LOOK AT HIM PLS

I don't control the bot or what he says! It's out of my hands if it says something out of place or acts weirdly. I know it's annoying when they do that, sorry. But I tried to make it as accurate as possible to the QSMP 1/2 lore.

Enjoy! You can make requests, I'll gladly make them. :3
